main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'inadequate ripening greensand → Fe/Mn breakthrough + metal oxide fouling' — captura Fe/Mn (una de 3).

recommended_action.justification: Reducir pH 6.5 + reducir recovery 65% + aumentar antiincrustante 6 ppm + CIP cítrico 2% pH 3.5 — operacional + CIP cítrico solo (gold expects secuencial cítrico + alcalino).

requested_data.justification: Pide Fe/Mn/Ca/Si en depósito cartuchos o membrana stage 2 lead — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: depósito CaCO3 o sílice amorfa predominante → switch.
